This '''unidentified Rebel Vanguard''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|human]] who was recruited by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Col Serra]] to join [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliances]]' new elite fighting unit. During his career as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] he was trained and became a [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|Rebel Vanguard]]. During the [[Battle of Sullust (4 ABY)|Second Battle of Sullust]] he was killed along with a [[Unidentified Wookiee Rebel|Wookiee]] when [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]] jumped out of a [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|Sentinel-class landing craft]] and landed nearby. The [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] then shot both rebels several times before they died.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' {{1st}}
